reforms.description: The Slovak government is preparing a Government Innovation Strategy aimed at reducing barriers to cross-border flows of technology and human capital, as well as harmonizing tax incentives and business support opportunities for both domestic and foreign firms.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By facilitating technology and human capital flows, the strategy is expected to enhance innovation and productivity in the economy.
reforms.status_evidence: A Government Innovation Strategy is under preparation.
reforms.importance_rationale: This strategy represents a significant shift in policy aimed at enhancing the innovation ecosystem in Slovakia, which is crucial for economic growth and competitiveness.
reforms.source_quote: A Government Innovation Strategy is under preparation giving reduction of barriers to cross-border flows of technology and human capital and the harmonization of tax incentives and business support opportunities for domestic and foreign enterprises high priority.
